name: Ghost and Price
description:
— Their Alpha.

~ Price and Ghost were two superior Omegas, Captain and Lieutenant of TF141. The two sought for an Alpha in their relationship, but their luck in Alpha hunting was horrid. Dejected, the two decided to just give up on the idea and settle with each other.

Until an Alpha, like no other, joined the task force. His docile behaviour, his gentle words and his self control was so incredibly sexy, and the two found themselves infatuated. They and their inner Omegas instantly knew; they needed this Alpha.
creator: notthewaychay
